channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Links
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: Opinion | Congress Can Just Shrivel. Or It Can Do What It Did After Nixon.
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 209 · likes: 922

item.title: Justice Samuel Alito, who wrote the opinion overturning Roe v. Wade, retires
item.description:
Although not well known outside the court, Alito played a key role in leading the conservative charge, not just on abortion, but on a host of other issues.

🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 130 · likes: 622

item.description: 🔥 · reposts: 104 · likes: 323

item.title: The Supreme Court Just Gave the Rich Even More Political Power
item.description:
The flow of money into US politics is already harming democracy, and now, it’s about to get worse.

item.title: Bill debt soars but many don't know help is available
item.description:
The majority of billpayers are unaware of special tariffs for water and broadband, the spending watchdog says.

item.description:

item.description:
The president's crypto income far outpaces his earnings from real estate and Trump-themed items such as watches.

item.title: How Phones Alerted Millions Before Quakes Shook Venezuela (Gift Article)
item.description:
Millions of people in Venezuela and surrounding countries received early warning alerts to their phones up to two minutes before back-to-back earthquakes on Wednesday.
